meta.title: ForceField Benchmark Results — Verified Security Performance | Data Science Technologies
meta.description: Published benchmark results for ForceField Enterprise AI Security Gateway: 98.9% attack detection, 100% data leak prevention, 0.3% false positive rate, and sub-millisecond security processing.
meta.keywords: AI Security Gateway Benchmark, AI Security Benchmark, Prompt Injection Detection Rate, MCP Security Benchmark, AI Agent Security Testing, DeBERTa Threat Detection, ForceField Performance

hero.title: Benchmark Results
hero.subtitle: Verified security performance on held-out data and production workloads

intro: Every number on this page comes from automated benchmark runs against held-out test data. We publish these results because transparency builds trust -- and because no competitor does it.

caveats.title: What We Don't Claim
items: Jailbreak-specific recall: 18.6% for DistilBERT multiclass (contrastive fine-tuning in progress)
Mixed encoding adversarial attacks: 12.5% detection (improvement planned)
FP rate on adversarial samples: 13% (the 0.6% figure is from the standard test corpus)
GPU acceleration and sub-100ms latency: roadmap items (Q4 2026)
SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001: in progress, not yet compliant
